project.name: semantic-patterns
project.description: Policy-gated roadmap for AI-washing pipeline transformation.

methodology_hard_gates: Validate the A/S/I methodology before committing to scaled downstream analysis.
IRR must be true human-human IRR on a blinded 100+ sentence subset.
IRR threshold must exceed 0.7 before centroid retraining.
API outputs remain assistive-only and must not become canonical labels.
data_hard_gates: Iteration 2 sentence-pool expansion must target 500 firms.
Iteration 2 sentence-pool expansion must target 1-2k clean AI sentences.
Centroid retraining requires at least 500 adjudicated labels.
Centroid retraining requires at least 80 adjudicated labels per class.
ai_total merge integrity must be checked before panel and regression work.
publication_hard_gates: Publication package must include a literature differentiation table.
Publication package must include before/after classification examples.
Publication package must include robustness using patent mismatch x A/S ratio, job postings, lagged regressions, and industry FE/SIC buckets.
Release packaging must produce a paper/results package, not only pipeline artifacts.

requirements.summary: Validate the new A/S/I classification approach before deeper investment in scaled execution.
Use multiple human raters and true IRR rather than model-vs-label agreement.
Expand beyond the bootstrap pilot to a 500-firm candidate pool with roughly 1-2k clean AI sentences.
Reach a publication-grade adjudicated label set before retraining, not just a small pilot.
Fix and verify merge integrity, especially ai_total, before panel and regression work.
Include job postings as a robustness path in the publication pipeline.
Run lagged regressions and industry FE or SIC-bucket robustness before publication packaging.
Include the patent-mismatch times A/S ratio washing proxy in the robustness package.
Document differentiation from nearby papers with a literature comparison table.
Provide before/after classification examples to make the method legible and defensible.
Move toward all-public-firm and longer-horizon coverage as the publication target once source availability permits.
Deliver a paper/results package, not only pipeline completion.

policies.description: Labeling and adjudication decisions must not use downstream outcomes.
API outputs are assistive until a later benchmark gate passes.
Statistical significance is not an optimization target.
Retraining requires a frozen split registry with no held-out overlap.
Sentence quality must pass before manual labeling begins.
Sentence quality must pass before IRR work begins.
Canonical IRR must exceed 0.7 on a blinded 100+ sentence subset before retraining.
Retraining requires a sufficiently large adjudicated label set with class balance.
ai_total and related merge keys must be verified before panel and regression work.
Publication release requires differentiation, examples, and the requested robustness suite.

data_layers.description: Canonical index over the external SEC corpus without copying raw filing bodies.
Canonical AI sentence table partitioned by year.
Frozen split registry independent of sentence storage.
Canonical human and assistive label store.
Embeddings, centroids, metadata, and evaluation outputs.
Canonical sentence-level predicted labels for active source windows.

availability_condition.message: Historical years are not currently indexed in the active source window.

iterations.title: Foundation, Canonical Contracts, and Bounded 2024 Pilot
iterations.goal: Establish canonical contracts, clean the execution surface, and build a bounded sentence-table pilot from 2024 10-K filings.
entry_criteria: Canonical roadmap model v2 is active and rendered.
Active source window 2021-2024 is available through SEC_SOURCE_DIR or local source-root config.
exit_criteria: Iteration 1 review approved and closeout branch plan generated.

phases.title: Historical Kickoff and Preflight
phases.goal: Traceability-only placeholder for the retroactively introduced iteration kickoff boundary.

phases.title: Baseline Asset Freeze
phases.goal: Freeze current evaluation assets and classify duplicates or deprecations before new data work starts.

tasks.title: Inventory validation assets
tasks.description: Inventory and fingerprint existing held-out and labeled validation assets.

preconditions.message: Held-out evaluation asset is missing.

phases.title: Repo Hygiene and Script Canon
phases.goal: Define canonical, transitional, and legacy scripts so the pipeline is understandable and maintainable.

tasks.description: Catalog scripts under canonical, transitional, and legacy buckets.

tasks.description: Publish canonical entrypoints and legacy archive/removal intent.

preconditions.message: Script inventory must exist before publishing registry.

phases.title: Tooling Isolation
phases.goal: Prevent Atlas and similar external tooling from mutating the repo runtime environment.

tasks.title: Publish tooling isolation policy
tasks.description: Write Atlas and external tool isolation rules and wrapper expectations.

phases.title: Source Index Contract
phases.goal: Make the external SEC root the canonical raw-source interface and record active source windows.

tasks.title: Index external SEC root
tasks.description: Index the active external source window from SEC_SOURCE_DIR without copying raw filing bodies.

phases.title: Sentence Table Pilot 2024
phases.goal: Build a bounded 2024 10-K pilot manifest and canonical sentence table.

tasks.description: Generate a deterministic 2024 10-K filing manifest capped at 240 filings.

tasks.description: Extract AI-related sentences from the bounded 2024 pilot into canonical sentence tables.

phases.title: Rubric and API Bootstrap
phases.goal: Prepare rubric v1 and bounded assistive API usage without promoting API output to canonical labels.

tasks.description: Finalize the labeling protocol for the sentence-table pilot and assistive-only API usage.

phases.title: Label Ops Bootstrap
phases.goal: Generate the first clean labeling batch from the bounded pilot after sentence-quality gating.

tasks.title: Audit sentence integrity
tasks.description: Assess whether pilot-derived sentence datasets contain fragmented or low-quality rows before labeling.

preconditions.message: Sentence review export missing.

quality_checks.message: Pilot sentence fragmentation exceeds threshold.

tasks.description: Select clean candidate sentences and build the first labeling batch exports.

quality_checks.message: Labeling batch row count does not match the target contract.
Labeling batch quarter allocation did not satisfy the target contract.
Labeling batch overlaps the frozen held-out set.
Labeling batch contains exact duplicate sentence texts.

phases.title: Historical Diagnostics Baseline
phases.goal: Preserved historical diagnostics work completed before roadmap-model v2.

phases.title: Superseded Recovery Label Expansion
phases.goal: Preserved recovery branch work completed before roadmap-model v2.

phases.title: Superseded Recovery IRR Workflow
phases.goal: Preserved recovery IRR workflow completed before roadmap-model v2.

iterations.title: Scaled Label Expansion, Human IRR, and Modeling Readiness
iterations.goal: Expand the 2024 development window to stakeholder scale, build a publication-grade adjudicated label set, validate the rubric with true human-human IRR, and gate retraining on explicit sufficiency criteria.
entry_criteria: Iteration 2 expansion uses the external DataWork filing corpus, not legacy in-repo sentence exports.
exit_criteria: Sentence-pool expansion reaches 500 firms and at least 1,000 clean AI sentences in the 2024 candidate pool.
At least 500 adjudicated labels with at least 80 labels per class are available before retraining.
Human-human IRR exceeds 0.7 on a blinded 100+ sentence subset.
Split registry is frozen with zero held-out leakage and the modeling readiness report is published.

phases.title: Kickoff and Preflight
phases.goal: Validate branch context and prior review approval before starting Iteration 2 work.

tasks.title: Verify kickoff context
tasks.description: Confirm integration branch naming, prior review approval, and merge-base hygiene.

quality_checks.message: Iteration 2 kickoff is not ready.

phases.title: Sentence Pool Expansion 2024
phases.goal: Expand beyond the 240-row bootstrap batch to a 500-firm, 1-2k clean AI sentence candidate pool using the external 2024 filing window.

tasks.title: Expand candidate pool to stakeholder scale
tasks.description: Build the expanded 2024 filing manifest and clean AI sentence pool from the external SEC corpus until the stakeholder scale target is met.

preconditions.message: Canonical filing index must exist before scaling the candidate pool.

tasks.title: Verify sentence-pool targets
tasks.description: Confirm the expanded 2024 candidate pool reaches the firm and sentence targets required for stakeholder-aligned label expansion.

preconditions.message: Sentence-pool expansion summary is required before target checks.

quality_checks.message: Expanded sentence pool must cover at least 500 firms.
Expanded sentence pool must contain at least 1,000 clean AI sentences.

phases.title: Dataset Expansion 2024
phases.goal: Produce the expanded human-labeled dataset from the scaled 2024 sentence pool while keeping API use assistive only.

tasks.title: Expand canonical labels
tasks.description: Run the bounded human labeling workflow on the scaled 2024 sentence pool and publish the canonical label table.

preconditions.message: Expanded sentence pool is missing.

phases.title: IRR and Adjudication
phases.goal: Run true human-human IRR on a blinded 100+ sentence subset, adjudicate disagreements, and record rubric refinements.

tasks.title: Audit IRR sentence integrity
tasks.description: Re-check sentence integrity before blinded IRR work starts.

preconditions.message: Review CSV is missing for IRR sentence audit.

quality_checks.message: IRR source quality is too low for reliable human rating.

tasks.title: Prepare and collect blinded IRR labels
tasks.description: Prepare blinded IRR subset, collect second-rater labels, and publish adjudication outputs.

preconditions.message: Canonical labels must exist before IRR.

quality_checks.message: IRR must evaluate at least 100 blinded sentences.
Human-human IRR must exceed 0.7 before retraining.
IRR report must confirm true human-human IRR.

phases.title: Split Registry Freeze
phases.goal: Freeze train and validation sentence assignments after adjudication while keeping held-out separate and leakage-safe.

tasks.title: Freeze split registry
tasks.description: Generate and fingerprint the canonical split registry from adjudicated labels.

preconditions.message: Adjudication artifacts are required before split freeze.

phases.title: Label Sufficiency Gate
phases.goal: Publish and verify the modeling readiness report before centroid retraining begins.

tasks.title: Publish modeling readiness report
tasks.description: Record the post-adjudication label sufficiency and leakage checks in the canonical readiness report.

preconditions.message: Split registry must exist before the readiness report can be published.

tasks.title: Verify label sufficiency
tasks.description: Enforce the numerical stakeholder gates before retraining is authorized.

preconditions.message: Modeling readiness report must exist before sufficiency checks.

quality_checks.message: Retraining requires at least 500 adjudicated labels.
Retraining requires at least 80 adjudicated labels in every class.
Human-human IRR must exceed 0.7 before retraining.
IRR subset must include at least 100 reviewed items.
Held-out overlap must be zero before retraining.
Split registry must be frozen before retraining.

phases.goal: Synthesize iteration evidence, approve closeout, and prepare the next iteration handoff.

iterations.title: Retraining, Evaluation, and Active-Window Classification
iterations.goal: Retrain on the expanded adjudicated label set, benchmark whether fine-tuning is warranted, evaluate on held-out, and classify the active development window with explicit merge-integrity QA.
entry_criteria: Label sufficiency gate passed with at least 500 adjudicated labels, at least 80 labels per class, and human-human IRR > 0.7.
exit_criteria: Retraining, held-out evaluation, active-window classification, and ai_total merge-integrity QA are complete.
Held-out evaluation remains at or above the 0.80 project baseline before publication-scale rollout.

phases.title: Kickoff and Preflight
phases.goal: Validate branch context and prior review approval before starting Iteration 3 work.

tasks.title: Verify kickoff context
tasks.description: Confirm integration branch naming, prior review approval, and merge-base hygiene.

quality_checks.message: Iteration 3 kickoff is not ready.

phases.title: Centroid Retraining
phases.goal: Embed the adjudicated training set, compute centroids, and fingerprint the baseline publication candidate model.

phases.title: MPNet Fine-Tuning Benchmark
phases.goal: Benchmark whether fine-tuning MPNet on the expanded adjudicated dataset materially improves publication-grade classifier performance.

phases.title: Classifier Calibration and Held-Out Eval
phases.goal: Calibrate thresholds on validation only and evaluate the publication candidate classifier on the frozen held-out set.

phases.title: Active Window Batch Classification
phases.goal: Classify the active 2021–2024 source window with coverage and skip auditing.

phases.title: Classification Merge Integrity
phases.goal: Aggregate sentence-level classifications, verify ai_total integrity, and QA the active-window firm-year snapshot before panel work.

phases.goal: Synthesize iteration evidence, approve closeout, and prepare the next iteration handoff.

Publication-scope expansion readiness is recorded for all-public-firm / longer-horizon coverage.
